sectionHeadings: 012 - Container-host deploy: zip/artifact path for dev/staging/prod plus the container-image path example
record.summary: Two cloud-agnostic deployment paths for a generic container host: (1) the zip/artifact path, the compiled Encore artifact (main.mjs + runtime) deployed per environment by the dev/staging/prod workflows over a shared reusable workflow, started with `node main.mjs`; (2) the container-image path, kept as the inert encore-cd.yml.example with a generic container deploy step. All third-party actions SHA-pinned and within the enterprise allow-list.
record.title: Container-host deploy: zip/artifact path for dev/staging/prod plus the container-image path example
